new_findings_this_run.detail: RUN31 flagged SIZE_edge_boost vs HIGH_LEV_10X conflict. RUN32 RESOLVED: SIZE_edge_boost (gate=80) description confirms '>5x leverage wins 57-60%' meaning 5-6x range. HIGH_LEV_10X (gate=20) blocks '>6x' (avg PnL -4.62). These are COMPLEMENTARY — SIZE promotes 5-6x, HIGH_LEV blocks 6-10x. No overlap. Rules coexist correctly.
new_findings_this_run.action: CONFLICT_CLEARED — no code change needed. Document in KB: SIZE_edge_boost targets 5-6x band, HIGH_LEV_10X blocks 6-10x band.

new_findings_this_run.detail: EVENING_session_boost (gate=20, conf=85) has treatment_wr=null in graduated_rules.json. AB tracker broken (day 54) means no outcome data collected. Demotion recommendation from run 31 was based on external meta_learning WR=33% vs baseline 36%, NOT AB tracker data. Demotion queued but needs AB tracker restoration to verify.
